sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88655" key="prosaparti/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσαπαρτίζω</orth>, <sense id="n88655.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">complete as well, LW</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2200.tlg006:1583" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1583</biblScope> </bibl> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Caria</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
